# terrible_community_hrobot_storagebox_snapshot_plan (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `plans` (String) The storage plan configurations. Note that right now there must be exactly one element. All date and time parameters are in UTC.
- `storagebox_id` (Number) The ID of the storage box to modify.

### Optional

- `hetzner_token` (String)
